data.title: Stocks plunged after Trump proposed additional 100% China tariffs, but futures rose post assurances; Oracle AI World discussed.
data.description: After President Trump announced significant tariffs on China late Friday, the stock market experienced a sharp decline. However, Trump reassured on Sunday that the situation would eventually stabilize. Additionally, anticipation surrounds Oracle AI World. Dow Jones Futures are showing an upward trend following Trump's statement that there will be a considerable delay before an additional 100% tariff on China is implemented.

data.title: Republicans are pushing for structural changes at the Fed as Trump reshapes board; GOP members rallying around the move.
data.description: The efforts by President Trump to influence the Federal Reserve are now impacting the composition of the central bank's board. Republican lawmakers are coming together to support significant structural changes at the Fed. This move signals a growing momentum to enact reforms that surpass the initial influence of the President on the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Ninepoint Partners' sold-out 2025 Short Duration Flow-Through LP raised $24.9 million through 999,927 Units sold at $25 each.
data.description: Ninepoint Partners LP has successfully closed the initial offering of Class A and Class F limited partnership units for their Ninepoint 2025 Short Duration Flow-Through Limited Partnership. The offering, which concluded on September 26, 2025, saw a total of 999,927 Units issued, generating $24,998,175 in gross proceeds. Each Unit was offered at a price of $25.00, with a minimum subscription requirement of 100 Units ($2,500).

data.title: Avenue Living LP closes $350m senior unsecured debenture offering.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 25, 2025, Avenue Living (2014) LP disclosed the completion of its recent transaction. The offering involved $350 million in total principal amount of Series B senior unsecured debentures, officially known as the "Debentures".
H1 results validate Roquette's strategy, showing strong performance.

data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group issued successful NOK 500 million green bond with 4-year maturity, coupon of 3-month NIBOR + 0.98% p.a, oversubscribed transaction.
data.description: On September 22, 2025, Lerøy Seafood Group ASA announced the issuance of a green bond worth NOK 500 million. The bond, rated BBB+ (Stable) by Nordic Credit Rating, has a 4-year maturity and a coupon of 3-month NIBOR + 0.98% per annum. The offering was met with high demand, being significantly oversubscribed.

data.title: Despite controversial policies, Trump's approval remains stable in latest poll conducted by NYT.
data.description: A recent study has found that approximately 40% of Americans aged 18-40 have experienced symptoms of burnout, with 60% indicating that the pandemic has worsened their mental health. Additionally, the data shows that over 50% of respondents feel that their employers do not care about their well-being. The study surveyed over 2,000 individuals across the United States. These findings highlight the significant impact of the pandemic on mental health and the need for employers to prioritize their employees' well-being.

data.title: Poll by Somos Votantes shows Latino voters turning away from Trump, highlighting warning signs for his support.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by the liberal-leaning organization Somos Votantes reveals that a significant number of Latino voters are becoming increasingly dissatisfied with the current president. The survey indicates a growing trend of disapproval among Latino voters towards the president's actions and policies.
Moody's: Political fragmentation in France raises the risk of a long-lasting reversal of key provisions of adopted structural reforms.
Moody's: France's debt affordability metrics will continue to gradually weaken in the coming years.

data.title: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. reports Q3 2025 net income of about $1,202,000, down 14.1% from Q3 2024.($1,399,000).
data.description: Great Neck, N.Y., October 24, 2025 - Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. announced that their net income for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, stood at about $1,202,000, equating to $0.11 per basic and diluted share. This was based on roughly 11.4 million weighted-average outstanding common shares. In comparison, the net income for the same period in 2024 was around $1,399,000, or $0.12 per basic and diluted share based on the same number of outstanding shares. This marks a decrease of $197,000, or 14.1%, which was primarily due to reduced revenue, offset in part by a decrease in interest expenses.

data.title: BitStarz named top online casino in Canada, with over 4,500 games and up to CA$2,000/5BTC + 180 free spins welcome package.
data.description: BitStarz has been crowned as the New Online Casino in Canada for 2025, following a comprehensive analysis of licensed operators catering to Canadian players. The platform stood out for its support for over 500 cryptocurrencies, vast game library of 4,500 to 10,000+ games, and commitment to player safety. It is licensed by the Government of Curaçao and operated by Dama N.V. BitStarz offers a generous welcome package of up to CA$2,000 or 5 BTC across the first four deposits, along with 180 free spins. The platform also provides ongoing promotions, transparent wagering requirements, and runs no-deposit bonuses like 20 free spins upon registration. BitStarz was recognized for its use of blockchain technology, provably fair gaming, and quick transactions. Its leadership in game diversity, bonus value, payment security, and mobile performance contributed to its top rank in the analysis. The platform caters to diverse player preferences, from classic slots to live dealer experiences and crypto-exclusive titles.(Player count: Millions of Canadians hold digital assets,Promotions: Reload bonuses, cashback offers, tournaments, VIP program,Deposit and withdrawal options: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, Dogecoin, Bitcoin Cash, Tether, and 500+ other digital currencies)

data.title: Cenntro gets 180-day extension to meet Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement.
data.description: Iselin, N.J.-- Cenntro, an electric vehicle company, has been granted a 180-day extension to comply with the Nasdaq minimum bid price requirement. The extension allows Cenntro more time to raise its stock price above the minimum bid threshold set by Nasdaq. This decision provides Cenntro the opportunity to continue trading on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: PLAYSTUDIOS will release Q3 2025 results on November 3rd after market close -LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)
data.description: Las Vegas-based company PLAYSTUDIOS, Inc. has recently revealed their Q3 2025 financial results. The announcement was made after the market closed on November 3, 2025.

data.title: Zepz introduces Sendwave Wallet on Solana for global remittance, leveraging USDC for peer-to-peer transactions.
data.description: The Sendwave Wallet has recently been introduced by Zepz, the parent company of WorldRemit and Sendwave, on Solana's platform. This new feature allows users around the world to engage in peer-to-peer transactions utilizing USDC.

data.title: Anthropic boosts team productivity with Claude's new memory feature, which remembers projects and preferences while giving users full control over data retention.
data.description: Anthropic has rolled out a new feature for Claude that improves team efficiency by allowing users to store project details and personal preferences. This enhancement gives users complete control over how long the data is kept, ultimately boosting productivity.

data.title: Ultragenyx Pharma grants 20,317 stock units to 17 new non-executive officers under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in therapies for rare diseases, announced the awarding of 20,317 restricted stock units of its common stock to 17 non-executive officers recently hired. These grants were approved by the board's compensation committee and issued under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on October 16, 2025. This move was considered essential in attracting new talent as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Rivalry Corp. closed third tranche of private placement, issuing 29,937,930 units at C$0.05 each, generating C$1,496,896.50 in proceeds.
data.description: Rivalry Corp. has successfully closed the third tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising gross proceeds of C$1,496,896.50 by issuing 29,937,930 units at a price of C$0.05 per unit. Each unit includes one subordinate voting share and one share purchase warrant exercisable at C$0.10 until October 8, 2027. The proceeds will be used for corporate development and general working capital purposes. The company may conduct a final tranche of the private placement by November 15, 2025.

data.title: Talisker completes first part of private placement, raising C$18.3M.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 2.3 million. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy experienced a 3.7% growth in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. Despite this growth, concerns about the job market linger as companies continue to struggle with the impacts of the ongoing pandemic.Experts suggest that government intervention may be necessary to address the rising unemployment rate and support struggling businesses.

data.title: Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PT) announces changes in the board of directors in Beijing on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: PT) disclosed that its board member Mr. Chao Chen had resigned. Pintec is a prominent technology platform aiming to facilitate creative financial and digital services globally.
